title: Yuki's Sleepy Hide and Seek
synopsis: Little Yuki plays a gentle peek-a-boo game with her sleepy animal friends as bedtime approaches, finding each one hiding in cozy spots around her bedroom.

pages.text: Time for bed, little Yuki! But where are all your sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes stands in her cozy bedroom at twilight, looking around curiously with partially visible stuffed animals peeking from behind furniture
illustration.alt: Yuki looking around her bedroom for hidden friends

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Is Bunny behind the curtain? Yes! Bunny is yawning and ready for dreams.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulling back a blue curtain to reveal a sleepy white bunny, with the curtain partially concealing both characters in a playful peek-a-boo moment
illustration.alt: Yuki finding Bunny behind the bedroom curtain

pages.text: Where is Teddy hiding? Under the soft blanket! Peek-a-boo, sleepy Teddy!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a pink blanket to discover a drowsy brown teddy bear underneath, with the blanket creating a hiding and revealing composition
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering Teddy bear under a blanket

pages.text: Is Kitty in the toy box? Peek-a-boo! There's sleepy Kitty, purring softly.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes opening a wooden toy box with a fluffy orange kitten emerging, the lid partially concealing the surprise element of the discovery
illustration.alt: Yuki finding Kitty in the toy box

pages.text: All friends found! Now Yuki climbs into bed. Peek-a-boo, sweet dreams! Goodnight, Yuki!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked in her bed with all her animal friends around her, moonlight partially hidden behind clouds creating a gentle peek-a-boo effect through the window
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with all her friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: Bunny was hiding behind the blue curtain in Yuki's bedroom!

questions.question: What was Teddy hiding under?
questions.explanation: Teddy was hiding under the soft pink blanket!

questions.question: Where did Yuki find Kitty?
questions.explanation: Kitty was hiding in the wooden toy box, purring softly!
